name: wpclaw
description: WordPress plugin with WPClaw agent blocks and backend loop.

scripts.build: npm run build:chat-react && npm run build:chat-interactivity
scripts.build:chat-react: cd blocks/chat-react && wp-scripts build --webpack-copy-php --output-path=build index=./src/index.ts view=./src/view.tsx
scripts.build:chat-interactivity: cd blocks/chat-interactivity && wp-scripts build --webpack-copy-php --output-path=build index=./src/index.ts view=./src/view.ts
scripts.start:chat-react: cd blocks/chat-react && wp-scripts start --webpack-copy-php --output-path=build index=./src/index.ts view=./src/view.tsx
scripts.start:chat-interactivity: cd blocks/chat-interactivity && wp-scripts start --webpack-copy-php --output-path=build index=./src/index.ts view=./src/view.ts
scripts.lint:js: wp-scripts lint-js blocks/chat-react/src blocks/chat-interactivity/src shared --ext js,jsx,ts,tsx
